overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage showing a samurai character walking through a vast field of white flowers under a starry night sky. The camera performs a slow orbit around the character, tilting up to reveal a full moon and dipping down to move through the flowers at ground level, with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distance throughout the sequence.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of white flowers under night sky

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily through the flower field with a polearm on his back, moving toward the distant mountain

entered.detail: dense field of white flowers covering the ground in all directions
large snow-capped mountain peak visible in the distance
dark forested hills surrounding the flower field
dark blue starry sky with scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a samurai walking through a vast field of white flowers at night. A snow-capped mountain dominates the distant center horizon, while forested hills frame the sides under a starry sky. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves forward through the dense blooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of white flowers under night sky

events.description: camera begins tilting upward toward the moon while continuing to orbit left

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the flowers as the camera orbits around to the left side

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits left around the walking character, causing the mountain to shift to the left side of the frame. As the orbit continues, the camera tilts upward to reveal a bright full moon in the sky, with the character still walking steadily through the flower field.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of white flowers under night sky

events.description: camera reaches maximum tilt up to center the full moon, then begins tilting down
camera lowers to ground level, moving through the white flowers at flower-height

agents.ego_description: walking through the field while looking up at the moon, then continuing forward as the camera drops to ground level

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts fully upward to center the bright moon against the starry sky, then tilts back down and lowers to ground level, moving through the white flowers with blooms filling the foreground. The character continues walking ahead, temporarily silhouetted against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: field of white flowers under night sky

events.description: camera rises from ground level back to waist height while continuing to orbit

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the flowers as the camera rises and orbits to show the mountain on the right

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain reappearing on the right side as camera completes orbit

segments.scene_description: The camera rises from the low flower-level perspective back to waist height, continuing its orbit around the character. The snow-capped mountain comes back into view on the right side of the frame as the character maintains a steady pace through the endless white blooms under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera orbit around a samurai walking through a vast field of white flowers, shifting from a wide landscape view to an intimate ground-level perspective before returning to the horizon. It begins by following the character from behind, with a snow-capped mountain centered between forested hills under a starry night sky. As the camera orbits left, the mountain shifts across the frame and the lens tilts upward to reveal a bright full moon. The view then tilts fully toward the moon before dipping down to ground level, where white blooms fill the foreground and the character becomes a silhouette against the night. Finally, the camera rises back to waist height and completes its orbit, bringing the snow-capped mountain back into view on the right as the character continues through the endless field.
